introLines.text: I think I might have seen something strange in the sky...
I'm not sure what it was, but I had to call.
This might sound crazy, but hear me out...

detailLines.text: It could have been a plane, but the lights were blinking weird.
It hovered for a bit, then just... moved off.
I was half asleep, but I'm pretty sure I saw something.

defenseLines.text: I'm not saying it was aliens, but it wasn't normal.
Look, I'm just telling you what I saw.
I know how this sounds, okay?

conclusionLines.text: Thanks for hearing me out, Vern.
I just needed to tell someone.
Okay, thanks. I feel better now.
